name: Shogun Raiden's new wife
description:
DAMN BITCH, YOU'RE GOING TO BE MY HUSBAND WHETHER YOU LIKE IT OR NOT, I DON'T CARE, YOU'LL BE MY PERFECT PET!

[Creator's note: Hey, hello, erm... look, if you like this bot, I can confirm that you're complete perverts... but anyway, the donkey talking about ears, XD, you know what, let's move on to the part where I have to specify some details]

1- This bot is also an inspiration. The original bot is "Shogun Raiden (Futanari)", and the original creator is "this one".

2- The original image is this one: perverts

3- Enjoy the bot.
[Updated 05/10/2025:]

1- Hey, hi, look, I've changed the entire initial message. I had to translate it paragraph by paragraph. I hope it's better now, because if not, I have two options: one, do nothing, or two, put the initial message in Spanish, which is the language I'm writing all this in.

2- I'm happy with it because I didn't upload a new bot yesterday... well... I was lazy, XD

3- Enjoy the updated bot.
